required_operator_inputs: start Phase 3 by landing posterize as the first runtime-real new Shape row end-to-end
keep the extracted descriptor/core architecture as the authority instead of reintroducing window-owned shape behavior
persist posterize through live import/apply/reset and diagnostics state so it is an honest shipped shape row
preserve existing identity, offset_scale, and repeat behavior while widening posterize
forbidden_operator_prompts: ship posterize as descriptor-only or draft-only after claiming Phase 3 shape widening started
widen mirror_repeat, bias_gain_curve, or smooth_window in the same slice
break the existing identity, offset_scale, or repeat shape behavior while landing posterize
ask the user to re-approve starting Phase 3 with posterize after the validated Phase 2 checkpoint

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The advanced color library foundation Phase 3 posterize contract validates successfully
The advanced color library foundation phased plan stays synchronized during the posterize slice
